fact_updates.rationale: Three consecutive pediatric appointment requests with times between 17:30 and 18:00 were all accepted and approved. No counter-examples observed.
All three appointment requests originated from the same clinic email address, and all were accepted — confirming this is the family's active pediatric provider.
Three appointments were accepted on 2026-05-12, 2026-05-26, and 2026-06-09 — each spaced exactly 14 days apart.

pattern_detections.pattern: Family consistently accepts evening pediatric appointments (17:30–18:00)
pattern_detections.support: 3 out of 3 proposed evening appointment times accepted across 2026-05-12, 2026-05-26, and 2026-06-09 — all approved by a parent with no rejections or reschedule requests.
